title: Appropriation (Supplementary Appropriation for 2024-25) Act 2025
text: Appropriation (Supplementary Appropriation for 2024-25) Act 2025 An Act for the appropriation of $467 512 000 out of the Public Account for the services of the Government for the financial year ending on 30 June 2025 [Royal Assent 11 April 2025] Be it enacted by Her Excellency the Governor of Tasmania, by and with the advice and consent of the Legislative Council and House of Assembly, in Parliament assembled, as follows: 1. Short title This Act may be cited as the Appropriation (Supplementary Appropriation for 2024-25) Act 2025 . 2. Commencement This Act is taken to have commenced on 1 July 2024. 3. Interpretation For the purposes of this Act – Capital Services means – (a) public works or property required for public purposes; or (b) a loan authorised by law; Operating Services means the ordinary annual services of the Government. 4. Issue, application and appropriation of $467 512 000 (1) In respect of the financial year ending on 30 June 2025, the Treasurer may – (a) issue the sum of $467 512 000 out of the Public Account; and (b) apply that sum for the services of the Government. (2) The sum specified in subsection (1)(a) is appropriated. 5. Purposes of appropriation The sum specified in section 4(1)(a) is to be applied for the purposes referred to in Schedule 1 and detailed in either of the following: (a) the agency information in support of the estimates for the financial year ending on 30 June 2025; (b) the information tabled by the Minister in support of Schedule 1 . 6. Expiry of Act This Act expires on 30 June 2026. SCHEDULE 1 - Purposes of Supplementary Appropriation 2024-25 Section 5 from top.html -->
